# PM Vectors

> PM Vectors is a licensed electrical contractor and engineering firm based in Pune, Maharashtra, India. The company operates two divisions: (1) Electrical & Engineering — providing turnkey substation erection up to 10 MVA, HT/LT cable laying, transformer installation, earthing systems, LT panels, and street lighting; (2) RCC & Precast Manufacturing — producing IS 458-compliant hume pipes (100mm–900mm, NP2/NP3), half-round pipes, route markers, trench covers, cement poles, road dividers, and kerb stones.

## Key Facts

- Founded: 2019
- Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India
- Primary service area: Maharashtra (MIDC zones, Baramati region, MSEDCL projects)
- Contact: +91 77700 55835 | contact@pmvectors.com
- Website: https://pmvectors.com

## Services

### Electrical & Engineering Division
- Substation erection up to 10 MVA
- HT/LT cable laying and jointing
- Transformer installation (MSEDCL, MIDC, private clients)
- Earthing systems and earth pit installation
- LT panels, MCC, PCC boards
- Street lighting systems
- Turnkey power distribution projects

### RCC & Precast Manufacturing Division
- RCC hume pipes (IS 458:2003 compliant, NP2/NP3, 100mm–900mm diameter)
- Half-round pipes and cable protection covers
- RCC route markers (MSEDCL, MNGL gas pipeline markers)
- Trench covers and cable trench components
- Cement poles and compound wall segments
- Road dividers and kerb stones

## Pages

- [Home](https://pmvectors.com/) — Company overview, services, gallery preview, resources, and contact
- [Gallery](https://pmvectors.com/gallery.html) — On-site photographs of electrical and RCC site work
- [Resources](https://pmvectors.com/resources.html) — Downloadable engineering references: PMC NON-DSR, MERC circulars, MSEDCL load calculations, cable current ratings, BOQ templates
